title: Multiplexer-Parameterized drain-with-worker + tmux Plugin Implementation Plan
summary: Step-by-step implementation guide for adding tmux support to the drain-worker launcher and creating a standalone tmux plugin, with checkpoint-tracked tasks.
notes: Implementation plan with procedural step-by-step structure (checkbox-tracked tasks), not a binding specification or decision record. Actual architectural decisions documented separately in design bead fhsk-3qy (docs/superpowers/specs/2026-06-13-tmux-drain-worker-design.md). Classified as DOC (runbook/guide) because it reads as a working tutorial for executing the implementation. Medium confidence reflects possible ambiguity with SPEC (technical plan), but the tutorial-like checkpoint structure and reference to an external design/spec document indicate it is primarily a DOC.
